title: 2-to-1 Multiplexer Implementation of a 1-Bit Full Adder
description: A visual representation of how two 2-to-1 multiplexers can be combined with an XOR gate to construct a 1-bit full adder circuit, demonstrating the use of multiplexers in HDL models for combinational logic.
relationships: Input A connects to MUX1 input I0 and MUX2 input I1
Cin connects to MUX1 input I1 and MUX2 input I0
Input B connects to the select lines of both MUX1 and MUX2
MUX1 output connects to the Cout output
MUX2 output and Input A connect to the inputs of the XOR Gate
XOR Gate output connects to the Sum output
